The '''Splendor Tavern''' was a well-known but seedy tavern on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The Tavern being no stranger to [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire, many of the flashy letters in its sign had been shot out, so that its name seemed to be simply "DOR" rather than "SPLENDOR". As a result, it was widely known as "'''the Dor'''".

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Deadly Hunter]]''
*''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]''
*[[Jedi Quest 3|''Jedi Quest'' 3]]
